  • Uses of TrackingUpdate in com.wip.entity

    Methods in com.wip.entity that return types with arguments of type TrackingUpdate
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    List<TrackingUpdate>
    Shipment.getTrackingUpdates()
    Returns the list of TrackingUpdate events for this shipment.
    Method parameters in com.wip.entity with type arguments of type TrackingUpdate
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    Shipment.setTrackingUpdates(List<TrackingUpdate> trackingUpdates)
    Sets the list of TrackingUpdate events for this shipment.

  • Uses of TrackingUpdate in com.wip.repository

    Methods in com.wip.repository that return types with arguments of type TrackingUpdate
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    List<TrackingUpdate>
    TrackingUpdateRepository.findByCreatedBy_Username(String username)
    Retrieves all TrackingUpdate records created by the user with the specified username.
    List<TrackingUpdate>
    TrackingUpdateRepository.findByShipment_Parcel_Customer_CreatedBy_Username(String username)
    Retrieves all TrackingUpdate records for shipments belonging to parcels of customers created by the specified user.
    List<TrackingUpdate>
    TrackingUpdateRepository.findByShipment_ShipmentIdOrderByCreatedAtAsc(Long shipmentId)
    Retrieves all TrackingUpdate records for a given shipment, ordered chronologically by their creation timestamp in ascending order.
    Optional<TrackingUpdate>
    TrackingUpdateRepository.findByUpdateIdAndCreatedBy_Username(Long updateId, String username)
    Retrieves a single TrackingUpdate by its ID that was also created by the specified user.
